name: Alfonso Quintanilla Sánchez
title: Talent Sourcer
bio: RavenPack is a global leader in financial data and intelligence, helping organizations turn vast amounts of unstructured information into decision-ready insight. Since 2003, RavenPack has focused on solving one of finance’s most persistent challenges: data is abundant, but usable data is scarce . By removing data friction across the entire lifecycle - from sourcing and preparation to deployment and action - RavenPack enables faster, clearer, and more confident decisions in high-stakes environments. Trusted by leading global financial institutions and used by approximately 70% of the world’s top-performing hedge funds, RavenPack combines deep financial domain expertise with proven data engineering and AI capabilities at scale. With more than 200 employees across the U.S. and Europe, the company has established itself as a gold standard for trusted, auditable, and production-ready financial intelligence. RavenPack offers two complementary products: RavenPack Edge , designed for quantitative and systematic investment workflows, and Bigdata.com , an AI-native platform for financial research and agentic systems built on trusted data. Bigdata.com enables professionals to deploy ready-made AI agents for instant insights or build their own via APIs—speeding up research, automating workflows, and driving better investment decisions.

name: Julia
title: Accountant
bio: Our customers engage us to solve technical challenges, often it's about Information Security, either strategy or vertical problems. No, we don't develop custom cryptography algos, we are not that smart. On the other hand, when it comes to doing security in an agile environment, e2e encryption, or hammering secret sharding into whatever application we might have some ideas. Same thing about deception tech and non linear defense in general. We know one thing or two about blockchain tech, as well as software development, in particular responsive apps. We got really strong opinion about awareness campaign, tabs vs spaces and zero trust. We respect the cloud, but we got nostalgia for data centers. We definitely love infrastructure as code, process optimisation and automation. We love sniffing and mangling packets, a bit vintage, but still lovely. We also love OIDC, and python3. We hate to waste time, ours and yours.

title: Frontend Engineer
bio: Our customers engage us to solve technical challenges, often it's about Information Security, either strategy or vertical problems. No, we don't develop custom cryptography algos, we are not that smart. On the other hand, when it comes to doing security in an agile environment, e2e encryption, or hammering secret sharding into whatever application we might have some ideas. Same thing about deception tech and non linear defense in general. We know one thing or two about blockchain tech, as well as software development, in particular responsive apps. We got really strong opinion about awareness campaign, tabs vs spaces and zero trust. We respect the cloud, but we got nostalgia for data centers. We definitely love infrastructure as code, process optimisation and automation. We love sniffing and mangling packets, a bit vintage, but still lovely. We also love OIDC, and python3. We hate to waste time, ours and yours.

name: Karin Esberg
bio: Sedan 2009 är jag fastighetsmäklare i Trosa/Gnesta. Efter dessa framgångsrika år i branschen tog jag 2013 steget att bli franchisetagare för SkandiaMäklarna. Jag håller hög servicenivå och älskar kundkontakter och vill att just DU skall göra ditt livs bästa affär. Mina kunder ger mig höga betyg vad gäller tillgänglighet, lyhördhet och kommunikation. Mina kunder värdesätter också min kunskap i yrket. Dessa fina lovord och jag mycket glad och tacksam för. Jag har tidigare arbetat inom serviceyrken och har även pedagogisk utbildning. Detta gör att jag försöker möta varje person och familj med respekt och ödmjukhet.

name: Camilla Levander
title: Franchisetagare
bio: Att arbeta som fastighetsmäklare innebär att alltid ha kunden i fokus och kunna erbjuda bästa möjliga service för att just din bostadsaffär ska bli din bästa affär i livet. I mitt arbete är jag positiv, tydlig och har ambitionen att vara den engagerade mäklaren som alltid finns tillgänglig vid frågor och funderingar för att du ska känna dig trygg under hela processen. Att jobba för SkandiaMäklarna innebär kvalitet, vilket är enormt viktigt för att kunna framhäva din bostad på bästa sätt. De flesta av mina försäljningsuppdrag är återkommande kunder och rekommendationer vilket fortsätter att driva mig framåt och vara professionell i min yrkesroll.

name: David Töyrylä
title: Fastighetsmäklare
bio: Med min kompetens, service och tillgänglighet är min ambition att göra bostadsaffären till en trygg och bekväm process ända från första kontakt till efter det sista mötet. Det kunden ska känna efter att ha anlitat mig är kvalité, glädje och att man fått valuta för pengarna. Jag är född och uppvuxen i Skutskär men bor nu i Gävle. Jag älskar alla sociala evenemang och möten. Den sociala kompetensen är något jag fått från sportaktiviteter i mina yngre dagar och som jag tar med mig in i mäklaryrket.

name: Einar Johansson
title: Fastighetsmäklare
bio: Mitt namn är Einar Johansson och jag har förmånen att arbeta med jobbet som jag drömt om sedan 15-års ålder. Jag skulle beskriva mig själv som en tvättäkta tävlingsmänniska med hjärtat på rätt ställe. För mig är trygghet, transparens och empati oerhört viktiga delar i ett lyckat affärssamarbete. Jag förmedlar villor och bostadsrätter i Linköping med omnejd vilket jag trivs oerhört bra med då jag är född och uppvuxen här och har lokalkännedomen med mig naturligt. Dessutom besitter jag ett stort nätverk. Med ett personligt engagemang och ett driv att maximera resultat guidar jag säljaren genom sin bostadsaffär med ambitionen att kvalitetssäkra alla steg och överträffa alla förväntningar. Att genomföra en bostadsaffär är ett stort åtagande där ingenting får lämnas åt slumpen oavsett om jag förmedlar en koja eller ett slott. För mig är det en ständig drivkraft att uppnå maximal kundnöjdhet gentemot såväl säljare som köpare.

bio: Våra medarbetare är det viktigaste som finns! Därför ser vi till att omge oss med människor vi tycker om. Det gör att vi tillsammans växer som företag, men också som människor. Vi tycker att det är viktigt att ha roligt på jobbet och ser därför till att gemensamt göra sånt vi gillar. Har du vilja, engagemang och driv kan du bli vår nya kollega! Vi har närmare 100 kontor i Sverige, Spanien och Portugal - var vill du jobba?

name: Farzaneh Hajilooiyan
title: Talent Acquisition Coordinator
bio: Playa Games has been an established developer and operator of browser-based and mobile games in the German market since 2009. At our Hamburg headquarters, with a magnificent view of the Binnenalster, we passionately create and develop new ideas daily for our award-winning MMORPG Shakes & Fidget and for future games. In addition, we take care of the huge community that has grown around Shakes & Fidget over the years. On our various social media channels, we provide important news, announce exciting Let's Play events, hold contests, supply players with codes, and much more. Playa Games is part of Stillfront. Stillfront is a global gaming company with 1400+ employees. We develop a wide range of digital games that attract over 50 million players each month. From well-established franchises like Supremacy, Big Farm, and BitLife to niche games, we span many different genres, including strategy, simulation, RPG and action, and casual and mash-up games.

name: Ahmed Mohamed
title: Entreprenadledare
bio: På Logeco AB, tillsammans med vårt dotterbolag SiteTeam och systemleverantören LogiPlan AB , arbetar vi för att revolutionera bygglogistiken. Genom att erbjuda ett helhetsåtagande – från de första strategiska besluten till det operativa genomförandet – skapar vi lösningar som gör byggarbetsplatserna mer effektiva, hållbara och säkra. Med Logecos strategiska planering , SiteTeams operativa samordning , och den digitala precisionen från LogiPlan , kan vi säkerställa optimerade logistikflöden som bidrar till att minska projektens klimatavtryck, förebygga risker och förbättra arbetsmiljön. Vi kombinerar innovation och erfarenhet för att lösa dagens och morgondagens logistikutmaningar. Genom samarbete och digitala verktyg skapar vi hållbara resultat som gynnar både våra kunder och samhället. Tillsammans bygger vi inte bara projekt – vi bygger framtidens bygglogistik!

name: Annika Karlsson
title: Marknadskoordinator
bio: Plats: Göteborg Vem är Annika? En 50+-are som njuter av livet med familj i både storstad och på kusten. Jag säger inte nej till olika event som t.ex. sport, en aw, en skidresa eller att fixa i trädgården. Men jag säger också  gärna ja till en ”soffliggardag” en mörk höstdag. Hur kom du i kontakt med Caparol första gången? Efter studier hamnade jag i färgbranschen och till slut på Caparol. Varför har du valt att arbeta på Caparol? Caparol är en del av en stor koncern vilket ger många fördelar samtidigt som det känns tryggt. Om du vill vara delaktig och vara med och påverka så finns det stora möjligheter till det. Hur länge har du arbetat på Caparol? 8 år Hur kan en arbetsdag se ut? Ingen är den andra lik, med varierande uppgifter blir det allt från att producera butiksmaterial, kontakt med butiker, måla dekorer och arrangera event. Vilken är din favoritdel i ditt arbete? Absolut variationen och få vara en del av ett härligt team. Vad är dina styrkor? Lösningsorienterad och är bra på att skapa kontakter både med kollegor och kunder. Vad är du mest stolt över med att arbeta på Caparol? Utvecklingen av hållbara produkter.

name: Michaela Bremander
title: Social Media Specialist
bio: Plats: Göteborg Vem är Michaela? Jag är 33 år och bor med Karl, vår dotter Bonnie och hunden Harry. På fritiden gillar jag att åka skridskor, möblera om och åka båt. Hur kom du i kontakt med Caparol första gången? Jag var precis färdigutbildad och såg en annons på nätet med en tjänst som lät lockande och passande. Kände till Caparol som varumärke då jag målat om en del, hehe. Varför har du valt att arbeta på Caparol? Härliga kollegor! Kul med produktion, lager och huvudkontor i samma byggnad – man får se hela kedjan och vara med och påverka. Gillar också företagets hållbarhetsfokus! Hur länge har du arbetat på Caparol? Snart 5 år. Hur kan en arbetsdag se ut? Det börjar med att jag febrilt letar efter mitt passerkort för att komma in, hehe. Skämt åt sido. Jag startar dagen med att tjingsa på kollegorna. Vi jobbar en stund för att sedan ta en kort frukost tillsammans (förutom på fredagar, då har vi en lång gemensam frukostbuffé). Under dagen producerar jag innehåll i form av bild och video till våra digitala kanaler, har kontakt med influencers och integrerar med våra kunder i våra sociala kanaler. Jag hanterar frågor, uppdateringar och innehålla på vår e-handel, www.caparolfarg.se . Sedan försöker jag förstå mig på vilka uppdateringar Meta har implementerar över natten, och skapar målgruppsinriktade annonser i Adsmanager. Jag jobbar tätt med mina avdelningskollegor och ena dagen kan vara en heldag vid datorn, och andra dagen är vi och fotar kampanjer i studion. Älskar variationen! Vilken är din favoritdel i ditt arbete? Jag tycker det är kul att skapa annonser och ha kontakt med kunder online. Vad är dina styrkor? Digital kommunikation Vad är du mest stolt över med att arbeta på Caparol? Företagets hållbarhetsfokus är något jag gärna berättar om för mina vänner.

name: Chris Thurling
title: Chairman
bio: I founded an agency called 3Sixty back in the days when digital was called New Media. After 17 years at the helm, I left 3Sixty to set up a coaching and consulting practice helping creative, digital and media agencies with their strategy. In January 2018, I returned to full-time agency leadership, joining James Ray and Andy Brown in an MBO of Armadillo, taking the role of Chairman . I became Chair of Bristol Creative Industries (formerly Bristol Media) in 2017. I am a Chartered Director (Institute of Directors) and a qualified coach (Institute of Leadership & Management Level 7).

name: James Ray
title: CEO
bio: After beginning my career client-side as a graduate trainee with WHSmith, I joined Armadillo - a young creative agency with a growing reputation for direct marketing - as an Account Executive in 1996. I went on to spearhead the agency’s evolution into an award winning direct and digital agency, fusing data, insight, strategy and creative flair with Armadillo’s characteristic pragmatism and common sense, to deliver successful CRM strategies for brands like McDonald’s, Disney, Hotels.com and Oxfam. I became Client Services Director in 2003, and Board Director and Partner in 2008 and Managing Director in 2013. In 2017 I became CEO after leading a successful management buy-out of the agency with Executive Chairman Chris Thurling and CFO Andy Brown. I’m a hybrid of skills and experience, with talents covering planning, strategy and client service. I love steering creative projects (almost) as much as I love being knee deep in data. And I’m obsessive about finding solutions and proving results.

bio: Bitastad AS er et trøndersk selskap som ble grunnlagt i 2017 og som eier og utvikler selskaper innen mat og drikke. Vi lykkes gjennom fantastiske mennesker, de beste matopplevelsene og sterke konsepter. Porteføljen består i dag av serveringskonseptene Jordbærpikene, SOT bar & burger, Sabrura, Big Bite, Sanoi og Kompis. Vi eier også vårt eget regnskapsbyrå; AST Regnskap, og vår egen distributør; Matmegleren.

Porteføljen består i dag av serveringskonseptene Jordbærpikene, SOT bar & burger, Sabrura, Big Bite, Sanoi og Kompis. Vi eier også vårt eget regnskapsbyrå; AST Regnskap, og vår egen distributør; Matmegleren.

name: Sebastiano Rossi
title: Commercial Director
bio: We Entertain, Empower and Inspire. Pubity Group is a community spanning 20 channels and counting, covering diverse subcultures. Gen Zs and millennials across the world follow the Pubity brands for their fix of news, sport, entertainment and popular culture. We deliver a unique online experience with our diverse brands, whenever and wherever you are. For hilarious meme culture check out Memezar; for entertainment and inspiration, Pubity; laugh with dadsayjokes; and for young women look out for Girlyzar. We’ve got sports, travel, animals, tech, gaming and much more. Whatever and wherever it is, we’ve got it covered.

name: Joanna Badawy
title: Head of AML
bio: TF Bank (TF Avarda Group) is a digital bank offering consumer banking services and e-commerce solutions through a proprietary IT platform with a high degree of automation. The platform is designed for scalability and adaptability to different products, countries, currencies and digital banking solutions. TF Bank prioritizes organic growth under controlled conditions and expansion is taking place in carefully selected segments and markets. Operations are conducted in the Nordics, the Baltics, Poland, Germany, Austria, Spain, Ireland, the Netherlands and Italy through subsidiary, branch, or cross-border banking with the support of the Swedish banking license. The business is divided into three segments: Credit Cards, Ecommerce Solutions and Consumer Lending. The target group for all services is creditworthy private individuals, and the loan amounts are relatively small with short repayment terms. TF Bank also offers deposit products in several markets.

bio: TF Bank (TF Avarda Group) is a digital bank offering consumer banking services and e-commerce solutions through a proprietary IT platform with a high degree of automation. The platform is designed for scalability and adaptability to different products, countries, currencies and digital banking solutions. TF Bank prioritizes organic growth under controlled conditions and expansion is taking place in carefully selected segments and markets. Operations are conducted in the Nordics, the Baltics, Poland, Germany, Austria, Spain, Ireland, the Netherlands and Italy through subsidiary, branch, or cross-border banking with the support of the Swedish banking license. The business is divided into three segments: Credit Cards, Ecommerce Solutions and Consumer Lending. The target group for all services is creditworthy private individuals, and the loan amounts are relatively small with short repayment terms. TF Bank also offers deposit products in several markets.

The platform is designed for scalability and adaptability to different products, countries, currencies and digital banking solutions. TF Bank prioritizes organic growth under controlled conditions and expansion is taking place in carefully selected segments and markets. Operations are conducted in the Nordics, the Baltics, Poland, Germany, Austria, Spain, Ireland, the Netherlands and Italy through subsidiary, branch, or cross-border banking with the support of the Swedish banking license. The business is divided into three segments: Credit Cards, Ecommerce Solutions and Consumer Lending. The target group for all services is creditworthy private individuals, and the loan amounts are relatively small with short repayment terms. TF Bank also offers deposit products in several markets.

The target group for all services is creditworthy private individuals, and the loan amounts are relatively small with short repayment terms. TF Bank also offers deposit products in several markets.

name: Marie Elisabeth Suhr Thomassen
title: Support & Customer Success Manager
bio: SmartDok er et programvareselskap med hovedkontor i Alta, Norge . Vi er i dag ca 70 ansatte fordelt på salg, support, utvikling, marked og økonomi. Vi har kontor i Alta, Tromsø, Bergen, Oslo og Stockholm . Vårt produkt er som navnet på selskapet, SmartDok. SmartDok er den mest brukte løsningen i bygge- og anleggsnæringen, og det er ikke uten grunn SmartDok  gir entreprenøren pulsen på prosjektet med en app/ett system. Vi fikk vår første kunde tilbake i 2007. Da var vi to ansatte. I dag,  over 3800 kunder senere, fortsetter vi å vokse og ansette dyktige fremoverlente mennesker som elsker å være med å skape noe. I 2018 ble Visma majoritetseier i SmartDok. SmartDok ble dermed Visma sin skybaserte programvareløsning for bygg- og anleggsbransjen. SmartDok vil fortsatt være SmartDok, samme navn, samme org.nr. og ikke minst samme dedikerte ansatte, men med en stor aktør i ryggen som gjør at vi står ennå sterkere enn tidligere. Pålitelig, engasjerende og forenklende

name: Elina Heinonen
title: People and Culture Development Manager
bio: Me Raisiolla teemme herkullista ruokaa, jolla edistämme terveellisempiä ruokatottumuksia. Teemme ympäröivästä maailmasta terveellisemmän ja onnellisemman kehittämällä uutta ja voittamalla kuluttajien sydämet puolellemme. Emme tee asioita yksin, vaan yhteistyöverkostot ovat meille tärkeitä kaikissa vaiheissa. Vahvat brändimme, kuten Benecol® ja Elovena®, tekevät tavoitteistamme totta. Vastuullisuustyöllämme teemme kuluttajien valinnan helpoksi: varmistamme tuotteiden vastuullisuuden eri näkökulmista, jotta Raision tuotteet voi valita huoletta. Terveellisen ruoan tekijöitämme on noin 350 kuudessa maassa ja viemme tuotteitamme yli 40 markkinaan ympäri maailman. raisio.com

name: Krishna Radhakrishnan
title: Hardware Engineer
bio: We are a world leader in embedded computer systems for harsh environments, with footprints in many parts of the solar system. We provide the full ecosystem to support digital hardware design for mission-critical System-on-a-Chip solutions. The IP cores and development tools support processors based on the SPARC and RISC-V architectures. In addition to this, we provide several standard components to meet various needs. Read more about us here , and learn about our products and solutions that have traveled to every corner of the solar system!

name: Asmita Singh
title: Chief Marketing Officer
bio: BARBRI Global is a global learning company dedicated to meeting the legal education and specialized training needs of law students, attorneys and other professionals throughout their careers. Building on the success of its core bar courses, which have helped more than 1.5 million lawyers around the world pass a U.S. bar exam, BARBRI offers a comprehensive suite of learning solutions for higher education institutions and law-related businesses. BARBRI Global is also the leading provider of legal education materials and tech-enabled legal learning solutions ranging from law school courses to topical overviews authored by distinguished law faculty and award-winning teachers. BARBRI's comprehensive portfolio covers products for U.S. bar prep, LSAT prep, curriculum, assessment, global license preparation, online program management, legal education materials, and professional development. BARBRI, founded in 1967, is a Francisco Partners portfolio company headquartered in Dallas, Texas, with offices throughout the United States and United Kingdom.

bio: Als eigenständige Tochter der Axpo Gruppe ist die Axpo Systems AG das Kompetenzzentrum für Telekommunikations- und OT-Lösungen im Konzern. Unsere Kunden haben einen systemrelevanten Auftrag und befinden sich im Segment der kritischen Infrastrukturen. Sie kennen nur den höchstmöglichen Anspruch, denn sie betreiben die systemrelevanten Dienste der Schweiz. Das definiert den Anspruch an Profession, Zuverlässigkeit, Qualitäts- und Sicherheitsstandards und die technische Lösungskompetenz an uns kompromisslos hoch – denn unsere Leistung ermöglicht erst die krisensichere Ausführung dieser unverzichtbaren Dienste.

name: Frida Lennartsson
title: CRM Consultant
bio: Omniarch är en prisbelönt tillväxtbyrå med branschens i särklass vassaste stjärnor inom e-handel, affärsutveckling och digitalisering! Omniarch hjälper företag att växa genom en sammanhållen och datadriven digital affär. Vi arbetar längs hela kundresan från räckvidd och konvertering till lojalitet och retention. Med bred kompetens inom varumärke, trafik, UX, konvertering och CRM kan vi snabbt identifiera vad som skapar störst effekt och fokusera insatserna där värdet är högst. Motto: Your Challenge, Our Passion.

name: Alexander Bihlar
title: Head of Application Team
bio: Hypex Bio’s technology is unique, patent-protected, and proven in commercial mining and construction environments. The environmental and health benefits are proven by customers and the market demand is enormous. In Scandinavia, Hypex Bio provides the explosive solution and associated equipment directly to end customers. The company also provides training, support and advice.  To date, Hypex Bio has delivered three factories and several delivery systems, as well as hundreds of tons of commercial explosives. Outside of the Nordics, Hypex Bio’s business model is to provide a technology platform to partners for the manufacture and delivery of Hypex emulsion explosives. The technology platform consists of process equipment, such as factories, charging equipment, transfer systems and proprietary chemical products that constitute key production inputs. Everything is designed in Sweden. The business model has been proven in Scandinavia and globally through multi-year contracts with large customers and partners.

name: Blake Morgan
title: Chief Strategy Officer
bio: As Chief Strategy Officer at Hypex Bio, I am privileged to be a part of a fantastic team and to have the opportunity to take an important role in building an industry-changing business with a positive impact on the planet. Don't hesitate to get in touch with me about any questions regarding our hiring process, open jobs and the team! Through the development and commercialization of a new environmentally-friendly civil explosive technology, which significantly reduces the environmental impact and financial cost of blasting, Hypex Bio is enabling an important shift in the mining and construction industries. By replacing ammonium-nitrate-based explosives with Hypex’s proprietary hydrogen-peroxide-based emulsion, Hypex not only helps reduce the local environmental impact of blasting, it also offers to reduce carbon dioxide emissions by up to 90 percent compared to conventional explosives.

name: Dennis Menning
title: Chief Research Officer
bio: Chief Research Officer at Hypex Bio Explosives Technology AB since 2021. 20+ years experience working with energetic materials (high explosives, propellants and pyrotechnics). Former employment at Swedish Defence Research Agency (FOI), focusing on support for Swedish Armed Forces and Swedish Police in military and anti-terrorism issues on a explosives technical level. Skilled test leader, project manager and scientist. EOD and demining experience from NATO service. M.Sc. in Chemical Engineering in 2004 from the Royal Institute of Technology in Stockholm.

name: Henrik Brygg
title: Head of Operations
bio: In my role as head of operations I am very involved in all of our day-to-day operations. I oversee the implementation team with Alex and the production team in Stockholm along with our site and operation in the north of Sweden. I have a team-based managing style and believe in the individual to take responsibility and believe that communication is the key to driving the team forward. My background is in government work on the defense and police side and I made the switch to the civil side in 2021 with the believe that Hypex Bio is the future of civil blasting and the less toxic and environmentally friendlier emulsion is a easy way to reduce the impact on the environment in a cost effective way. _____________________________________________________________________________________________ I min roll som verksamhetschef är jag mycket involverad i alla våra dagliga verksamheter. Jag leder implementeringsteamet med Alex och produktionsteamet i Stockholm tillsammans med vår anläggning och verksamhet i norra Sverige. Jag har en teambaserad ledarstil och tror på individuellt ansvar och tror att kommunikation är nyckeln till att driva teamet framåt. Min bakgrund är inom staten på försvars- och polis sidan och jag gick över till den civila sidan 2021 med övertygelsen att Hypex Bio är framtiden för civil sprängning och att den mindre giftiga och miljövänligare emulsionen är ett enkelt sätt att minska påverkan på miljön på ett kostnadseffektivt sätt.

name: HC
title: Chief Operating Officer
bio: Aety er et konsulenthus og din dedikerede teknologipartner – en full-service shop , der styrker samarbejdet både internt i teams og på tværs af organisationen med best-in-class IT-løsninger. Fra begyndelsen har Aetys mål været at løse forretningsmæssige udfordringer ved at bruge teknologi som rygraden, men mennesket som fundamentet for succes. I dag er vi det førende konsulenthus i Norden inden for Atlassian-produkter, monday.com og Miro.

name: Julie
title: Solutions Consultant
bio: Min hverdag som monday-konsulent består i at være limen mellem mennesker, processer og systemer. Jeg får unik indsigt i virksomhedsstrukturer og hjælper kunderne med at forstå deres processuelle optimeringsområder. Ydermere rådgiver jeg i og oversætter alt det tekniske i monday.com til noget håndgribeligt og intuitivt, der skaber ro og overblik i kundernes dagligdag. Min rolle er spændende, fordi jeg får lov til at give andre mennesker en effektiv og overskuelig hverdag og fordi jeg kan se direkte resultater af mit arbejde.

name: Malene
title: Solutions Consultant
bio: Da jeg startede hos Aety, skiftede mit fokus fra Salesforce til Atlassians produktportefølje, hvor jeg hurtigt opdagede, at min baggrund var utrolig værdiskabende. Det fundamentale konsulenthåndværk - evnen til at diagnosticere problemer og designe stærke IT-løsninger - er det samme, uanset platform. For mig handler det i høj grad om at kunne forstå kundens behov, stille de rigtige spørgsmål og oversætte dem til konkrete løsninger. Derfor er dit erfaringsgrundlag det vigtigste, når du skifter platform. Jeg kunne trække direkte på min dybe systemforståelse, hvilket gjorde, at jeg hurtigt fik et solidt greb om Jira, Confluence og hele Atlassian-økosystemet og kunne understøtte vores kunder.

name: Malene
title: Senior Solutions Consultant
bio: Som konsulent er jeg både en sparringspartner i best practice og metodikker, og en teknisk nørd der elsker at konfigurere platformen og automatikker – lidt ligesom en digital tryllekunstner! Min hverdag er varierende, og spænder fra at hjælpe kunder med at kortlægge deres arbejdsprocesser, til at dykke ned i den tekniske jungle og konfigurere Atlassian platformen, til at undervise i systemerne. Jeg finder det tilfredsstillende at kunne være med på den fulde rejse for kunden, fra behovsafklaring til den tekniske opsætning - uden nødvendigvis at skulle overdrage opgaven ved næste fase, som det gøres flere andre steder.

name: Lisa Cawley
title: Donor Liaison Manager
bio: I joined Anthony Nolan in February 2001, as Clerical Assistant, I’ve worked various roles at Anthony Nolan, Recruitment, VT Coordinator, VT Supervisor and was appointed as Donor Liaison Manager September 2012 in the Operations and Patient Services Division. My teams (in Donor Liaison) include VT Team, Register Enrichment Team (previously Phenotype Team) and Tracing Team. We ensure we deliver a positive experience for our donors throughout their journey with Anthony Nolan. Building productive working relationships with external and internal customers and communicating effectively, providing great customer service through the process and provision of blood samples to customers. I'm an avid reader, I love spending time with family and friends, eating out, especially brunches and afternoon teas, listening to music which I find very therapeutic, going to the theatre and weekends away.

name: Carl-Johan von Uexkull
title: Partnerships & Groups
bio: Doconomy, founded in Sweden in 2018, is a world-leading provider of digital services for everyday climate action. Doconomy wants to future-proof life on planet earth by empowering individuals and corporations to take responsibility for their environmental footprint. We firmly believe that the climate crisis can only be solved as a collective. Doconomy is also a partner of the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC), Mastercard, S&P Trucost, the World Wildlife Fund (WWF), Mitsui and Parley for the Oceans.

bio: Doconomy, founded in Sweden in 2018, is a world-leading provider of digital services for everyday climate action. Doconomy wants to future-proof life on planet earth by empowering individuals and corporations to take responsibility for their environmental footprint. We firmly believe that the climate crisis can only be solved as a collective. Doconomy is also a partner of the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC), Mastercard, S&P Trucost, the World Wildlife Fund (WWF), Mitsui and Parley for the Oceans.

name: Andrea Domenico Paparella
title: Responsabile commerciale
bio: Lo sapevi che in italia ogni anno vengono sprecate 200.000 tonnellate di cibo, con una perdita di oltre 520 milioni di euro? Beh, noi di Tuidi stiamo cambiando questo scenario, utilizzando il Machine Learning per prevedere come fattori come meteo, festività, eventi e tanto altro, influenzano gli acquisti. Oltre 300 punti vendita in tutta Italia ci hanno gia scelto, ma questo è solo l’inizio. Cosa ci rende unici? Il nostro team è giovane, dinamico e pieno di energia. Lavoriamo in un ambiente in cui ogni idea viene ascoltata con attenzione, e siamo convinti che solo grazie al lavoro di squadra sia possibile realizzarle.

bio: PolyPeptide Laboratories France est la filiale française du groupe international PolyPeptide présent en Suède, en Inde, aux Etats-Unis, en Belgique et en France à Strasbourg plus précisément. PolyPeptide Group AG et ses filiales consolidées (« PolyPeptide ») est une organisation spécialisée dans le développement et la fabrication sous contrat (CDMO) d'ingrédients pharmaceutiques actifs à base de peptides et d'oligonucléotides. En soutenant principalement ses clients dans les secteurs pharmaceutique et biotechnologique, elle contribue à la santé de millions de patients à travers le monde. PolyPeptide dessert un marché en forte croissance, offrant des produits et services depuis les stades précliniques jusqu'aux stades commerciaux. Son large portefeuille reflète les opportunités dans les thérapies médicamenteuses à travers divers domaines, avec une grande exposition aux maladies métaboliques, y compris le GLP-1.

name: Zoltán Sárvári
title: Head of Client Management
bio: The Budapest based dynamic and innovative  international compliance service center, KPMG Global Services Hungary is proud to have professionals with relevant language and technical skills from more than 40 countries around the world. KPMG Global Services Hungary is committed to building a diverse, equitable and truly inclusive company. We actively encourage diversity and inclusion, while opposing all forms of unlawful and unfair discrimination on the grounds of age, disability, gender reassignment, marriage and civil partnership, pregnancy and maternity, race, religion or belief, sex and sexual orientation. Join us, and become our next muticultural compliance professional!

name: Ildikó Molnár
title: Director
bio: Ildikó joined KPMG in 2005 as part of the team upon which KPMG Global Services Hungary (“KGSH”) was later built and she currently serves as a Director. In October 2019 she was appointed to lead the Project Team. Prior to that, she led some of KGSH’s biggest engagements as client director and was responsible for ISO implementation as Head of Process Improvement. During her time at KPMG, she spent one year at our Chicago office and one year at our London office on long-term secondments. She has expertise in indirect tax advisory and compliance and is a certified tax adviser and a chartered accountant as well.

name: Turo Salmi
title: Liiketoimintapäällikkö
bio: LSK Group on talotekniikan ja teollisuusautomaation asiantuntijayritys, joka keskittyy tuottamaan älykkäitä ja energiatehokkaita ratkaisuja sekä uusia innovaatioita asiakkaidensa tarpeisiin. Vuonna 1930 perustetussa perheyrityksessä työskentelee lähes 200 teknisten alojen asiantuntijaa. Liiketoimintamme koostuu kiinteistö- ja teollisuusliiketoiminnoista. Yrityksen päätoimipiste sijaitsee Lahdessa ja liikevaihto oli vuonna 2024 noin 35 milj. €. www.lsk.fi OTA MEIHIN YHTEYTTÄ

Yrityksen päätoimipiste sijaitsee Lahdessa ja liikevaihto oli vuonna 2024 noin 35 milj. €. www.lsk.fi OTA MEIHIN YHTEYTTÄ

name: Cristina Izquierdo
title: Talent Acquisition Manager
bio: ¡Hola! Si has llegado hasta aquí, ya tenemos algo en común. Yo también suelo curiosear. 😜 Soy una estudiante infinita, entre mis estudios están magisterio, antropología, recursos humanos y la vida. Siempre me ha gustado ayudar a los demás y entenderlos, por eso decidí emprender el viaje en esta área y, puedo decir, que soy una afortunada por formar parte del equipo de Human Talent desde hace 3 años. Por mi cuerpo corre sangre andaluza y llevo a Barbate por bandera 🏴‍☠️ aunque actualmente vivo en Alicante. Mi tiempo libre lo dedico a leer 📚, pasear por la playa 🌊 y a estar con mis gatitos (que por cierto, ellos me ayudan a trabajar para ganarse sus Whiskas. 🐱‍👤🐱‍💻) Una película 🎥: In time. Un libro 📕: Dime quién soy de Julia Navarro.

name: Cristina Sánchez Irles
title: Talent Acquisition
bio: ¡Hola! Soy Cristina y llevo en la familia CONVOTIS Iberia desde junio de 2022 😊 A lo largo de mi carrera profesional me di cuenta que ayudar a otras personas era lo que más me gustaba. Por eso, decidí estudiar Psicología mientras trabajaba. Gracias a ello, pude hacer prácticas extracurriculares en CONVOTIS Iberia y empezar mi andadura en el equipo de Human Talent ✌️ En mi tiempo libre me gusta seguir aprendiendo, principalmente sobre psicología, crecimiento personal y nutrición. Me gusta hacer deporte 🏋️‍♀️, leer 📚 y viajar 🌍 Una película: Little Miss Sunshine , aunque soy más de series y sin duda, la primera que me viene a la cabeza es The Office . Un libro: La buena suerte de Fernando Trias de Bes y Álex Rovira. Una canción: Valiente de Vetusta Morla.

name: Josue Roca
title: People Development Manager
bio: Soy un ser muy social, quizá por ello decidí estudiar Psicología. Oficialmente lo soy desde 2014, aunque a día de hoy sigo sin ser un "psicólogo común"... desde el principio de la carrera me decanté por el mundo de la empresa y no la clínica, quizá por aquello de que mis padres emprendieron con una carnicería de pueblo . Hoy me dedico a buscar vías para que la gente desarrolle su máximo potencial en su entorno de trabajo y trato de facilitar que todos en Teralco tengan oportunidades de crecimiento y formación. Espero por mucho tiempo poder seguir haciendo esto que da sentido a mi labor profesional, ya que soy un firme defensor de que las empresas pueden hacer una gran labor para mejorar el mundo y la sociedad, pero nosotros tenemos que hacerlo posible.  Como decía San Agustín: "Decís vosotros que los tiempos son malos. Sed mejores y los tiempos serán mejores. Vosotros sois el tiempo."

name: Juanma Escudero
title: Talent Aquisition
bio: Mi formación es en RRLL y RRHH que estudié en la Universidad de Alicante ya que siempre me ha llamado la atención poder trabajar en mi día a día con personas y poder ayudarlas a encajar lo mejor posible en algo que ocupa tanto tiempo de nuestra vida como es el trabajo. Así es como disfruto mi día a día en el departamento de Human Talent en CONVOTIS Iberia. En cuanto a mi tiempo libre suelo dedicar mis fines de semana a arbitrar rugby, deporte al cual he jugado durante 14 años y que llevo arbitrando algo más de 8 💪🏉. Todo esto también lo acompaño con una banda sonora en mi vida, ya que según Spotify he escuchado más de 110.000 minutos de música este último año 🎶´ Una película: cualquiera de Wes Anderson Un libro: Buenos presagios , de Neil Gaiman Una canción: por lo visto unas cuantas Coméntame cualquier duda que te pase por la cabeza 😉

name: Sandra Sánchez Martín
title: Head of HR
bio: ¡Hola! Soy Alejandra Sánchez, y formo parte de la familia Convotis desde septiembre de 2021. Trabajo en el sector IT desde el año 2008 y me apasiona mi trabajo ya que uno de mis propósitos en la vida es poder ayudar a otros siempre que pueda. Soy madre de un adolescente y me considero una persona bastante inquieta y activa. Me costaría mucho elegir entre mar 🌊 o montaña ⛰ si me dieran a elegir, pero viviendo en Alicante tengo la suerte de contar con ambas cosas. 😎 Soy adicta al queso , a las croquetas y al aguacate. 🧀🥑 Una película: El silencio de los corderos. Un libro: " Diferente " de Eloy Moreno . Una canción: Cualquiera de Viva Suecia . Si quieres conocer algo más sobre nosotros, no dudes en ponerte en contacto conmigo. ¿Despegamos? 🚀

name: Sergio Bonillo
title: Talent Acquisition
bio: Estudié Psicología porque quería entender un poco mi mente y mi personalidad, no lo conseguí, pero lo que si entendí es que me quería dedicar a las personas, a trabajar con ellas en toda su amplitud. Así que mi objetivo es que donde me lleve el futuro, pueda trabajar en Human Talent. Me debato entre vivir rodeado de tecnología y aislado en la montaña, ya que me gusta al mismo nivel las últimas tecnologías que escalar o hacer senderismo. Lo bueno que otra de mis pasiones es comer y eso puedo hacerlo en cualquier parte del mundo. 🍗🍤🍕🍲🍨🎂🍫🍺🍷 Una película: Memento o cualquiera de Christopher Nolan . Un libro: El Conde de Montecristo de Alexandre Dumas . Una canción: Nothing else matters de Metallica . Para cualquier cosa que tengas en la cabeza, estoy disponible!

name: Arnaud Kauffmann Torta
title: VP Brand & Products Parts & Accesories
bio: Bihr is the leading European distributor of rider gear and spare parts, accessories and tyres for motorcycles, quads/ATV and scooters. Founded in 1975, the company is present in over 15 countries. Our portfolio comprises about 350 brands and more than 200.000 items distributed through a network of 15.150 dealers. This is made possible by 750 employees, 1.200 at peak seasons, including 100 in-house sales representatives and more than 60 customer service representatives. From the outset, the strength and foundation of this exceptional success have been based on comprehensive services and first-class logistics. With a total storage area of more than 54.500 m2 spread over 7 warehouses, Bihr is able to supply almost all dealers in Europe within 24 hours. www.mybihr.com In 2022 Bihr was acquired by Arrowhead. Arrowhead Engineered Products Based in Blaine, MN, Arrowhead Engineered Products is a leading global engineer and omnichannel distributor of non-discretionary, proprietary branded, aftermarket replacement parts. The Company leverages data and digital capabilities to provide mission-critical parts for outdoor power equipment, powersports, golf cars, specialty vehicles, agriculture, and other diverse markets. With distribution and sourcing locations in North America, Europe and Asia, Arrowhead Engineered Products employees service over 100,000 customers globally. www.arrowheadepinc.com

name: Luis March Ruiz
title: Data Scientist
bio: I was born and raised in a small town really close to Valencia (Spain). I have studied a  physics degree and PhD at the University of Valencia. I continued my post-doctoral studies during 10 years working at Universidad Autónoma de Madrid (Madrid, Spain), Instituto de Física Corpuscular (Valencia, Spain), University of the Witwatersrand (Johannesburg, South Africa) and University of Geneva (Geneva, Switzerland, but most of the time I was based at Centre Européen pour la Recherche Nucléaire (Geneva, Switzerland). During last years, I started working on the private sector as a Data Scientist: In Inmarsat (telecommunications company) for the Aviation Business Unit being based in Geneva (Switzerland) from September 2017 to April 2021 In Geoblink (Data Foundations team) and then later MyTraffic (Data Science and Business Value lately), since August 2021 being based in Valencia (Spain)

name: Claudia
title: Head of Growth Marketing
bio: I love to challenge myself every day to grow as a human and, as a professional person. I have always been fascinated and attracted by the world of communication, adv, and brands. I am passionate about what I do and I know that team working is everything thanks to my 11 years of basketball playing. I am organized and motivated, a tireless person who works well under pressure, and respect deadlines. I am the the Head of Growth Marketing at MyTraffic, a B2B Paris-based company that uses the power of reliable, dynamic, and tangible traffic data insights (pedestrian/vehicle) in a SaaS platform to help companies take quicker and smarter decisions. Previously I was Marketing Manager at the RepTrak company with the HQ in Boston. In 2021 I have taken the role of Chief of Staff at RepTrak, supporting the CEO and company strategy. During my last experience at the Centre for Strategic Communication (CECOMS) at IULM University, I developed my research skills and strategical thinking, working on the evaluation of the communication performances of various Italian brands. Previously, as an intern at l’Oréal Italia, I had the chance to improve my skills in problem-solving and time management.

name: Adam Elfsborg
title: System Developer
bio: Adam talked his way into MTEK - got a job right after internship "Love this job" Eventhough Adam Elfsborg only is 19 years old, he has already worked at MTEK for three years. "My teacher worked at MTEK and when I heard him talk about the job, it sounded so exciting, so before the summer vacation after the first year of high school, I called Mattias (Andersson, CEO) and asked if I could please come in for an interview," Adam says and continues: “Before the interview I was really scared. After all, I was a just a schoolkid and felt like I didn't know anything. But as soon as I got there, I met amazing and wonderful people and everything was so relaxed. All my doubts and nervousness just disappeared.” Adam continued to work during the summers until graduation. The goal was always MTEK, and after a paid internship via Tekniksprånget, he became permanently employed just six months after completing his education. “I love programming and I wanted to get a job where I have fun. I found that combination right here at MTEK.” “The job varies all the time and I learn new things every day. It feels amazing!” Thanks to MBrain, the job is even more exciting. "It's fascinating to see how all the separate parts in MBrain come together - and how it then becomes useful for our customers," he says and continues: “Other systems specialize in only one thing. We do everything in one. To be a part of building that is really cool”. The coolest thing about MBrain is : "That MBrain can be used in all places in an organization and how everything is connected" The best thing about working at MTEK is : "Being able to do what you love together with wonderful colleagues"

name: Andreas Rubensson
title: Team Leader Development
bio: Andreas is making a career within MTEK - "Thrives in the leadership role" When Andreas Rubensson, 29, was hired in the summer of 2018, MTEK had not even begun its journey of success. “Both my cousin and father told me that it was a company that had something fun going on, so I went there. Back then, they only had one concept, MBrain was in an Excel sheet," Andreas recalls. Back then he had a bachelor's degree in computer science in Uppsala and was looking for a job. “I had been interested in graphical user-friendly interfaces and they were looking for someone with that interest. Well, then I will get to work with what I studied for, was my thought". Today - four years later - Andreas reveals that he has not regretted that decision even once. “I can't see myself anywhere else. There is such a drive in this company. And to be able to create a program that makes working life more efficient for people in the industry, that their work becomes more enjoyable - that's a journey I want to be part of". When Andreas was hired, MTEK was only just starting up. The roles were few. But as the company grows, new functions are required. And leaders. "If a person likes the workplace, feels good and gets to do what he or she is good at - then MBrain will also be good. So when I last year was asked to be the team leader for the developers, I didn't hesitate. When I achieve success with my group, it is greater than when I succeeded alone". And Andreas measures success to when the team tweaks the interface of MBrain so the customers can more easily solve their challenges. “You can have the world's most advanced system, but if it's difficult to use, it's basically useless. It should be easy to do the right thing". The coolest thing about MBrain is: The extent, that we can eliminate several systems instead of becoming yet another in a row of systems in an industry. The best thing about working at MTEK is: The people here, they are what make us successful!

name: Elsa Matteoni
title: System Developer
bio: Elsa is employed as a programmer - and a PT: "This is my dream" As a trained Health educator at the Swedish school of sport and health sciences in Stockholm, Elsa Matteoni, 36, worked with training and developing people. However, there was a no real next step for advancement in that career.  So she chose to change careers. “The IT industry is endless and therefore super interesting. It's now or never," Elsa says. She chose to study  .NET-developer at the University of Technology in Gävle and did her internship with us at MTEK. “It seemed like a good place to work. It is truly a growing company that is at the forefront of the industry." And even before finishing the internship she was given an unexpected offer; employment as a programmer - and as a PT. "This was my dream, but I didn't think it would come true so quickly." PT, i.e. personal trainer, is written into the employment contract. In practise, this means that she currently leads two lunch sessions a week for interested employees. In addition, she is available to anyone who wants to have their own personal training programs. "Physical activity offers many benefits, not least in terms of health, both physical and mental. The fact that MTEK offers their staff this opportunity shows that they are an employer that cares about their employees" Most of the working time is devoted to MBrain, as a software developer: “It's the creative part of the job that's so fun. It's almost like putting together a puzzle. You get an assignment and then you add all the pieces until the picture is complete, meaning that the assignment is completed and the product is ready to use.” It can sometimes seem lonely to stare into the screen and be engrossed in a task. But Elsa protests directly to that statement: “We talk all the time about what we do. The atmosphere is very open and unpretentious. Everyone only sees opportunities. In many other male-dominated professions, there is a lot of jargon. That is not noticeable here. On the contrary". The coolest thing about MBrain is: The coolest thing about MBrain is the wide extent of functionalities and that it meets so many different needs. The best thing about working at MTEK: The best thing about working at MTEK is the colleagues, the team spirit and the drive. It's also cool to be involved in the development of such a great product as MBrain.

name: Isa Bomark
title: System Developer
bio: Isa went straight from school to MTEK  - “Much more fun than I thought” It must be said straight away: Isa Bomark, 19, didn't really want to go to MTEK. “I did definitely not want to be a programmer. It seemed like such a boring job.” At the time Isa had just finished the technical program at Voxgym. As a student there, you have some education a spent with us at MTEK. “The programming we did at school was way too easy. I never thought I would find it stimulating.” School has always been easy for Isa. As a result of her quick learning abilities, she even skipped a class. “I understand everything that is logic right away. Maybe that's why I like fixing cars in my spare time. That´s logic. It started with me fixing my own A-tractor and after that my car. It happens that I fix other people's cars too.” Although the teachers pushed Isa to apply for an internship MTEK via Tekniksprånget, she did not want to. But on the last day open for application, she still applied. “I had no other job and I thought; if I find something else, I can always drop out of MTEK". She has not regretted applying for the internship. “It was extremely different. It was complex and challenges make me thrive.  Now I'm never bored at work," Isa says. She got a permanent job immediately after the internship. “MTEK is a great environment and the people are super.  We solve challenges together. Everyone helps out and even if I am the youngest person, experienced and older people come to me and ask for advice. It is so prestige-less.” Lately, Isa has been working a lot with automated updates in MBrain. "If something is made in one part of the factory, everyone should be able to keep track of it immediately. It should be easy to get an overview, without a lot of whiteboards and stuff. By having the floor, the office, the warehouse and everyone else get the same information at the same time, you save a lot of time. It will be effective.” The coolest thing about MBrain is: Knowing that it is an important tool for many companies to be able to drive their business forward and develop in a way that would not have been possible otherwise. The best thing about working at MTEK is: To always have the opportunity to work with new challenges together with great people.

name: Per Westerfur
title: System Developer
bio: The teacher Per Westerfur chose MTEK - now works with his former students: "That lights my fire" Per Westerfur, 50, has worked at MTEK almost four years and is one of the brains behind the MBrain system. That he ended up here is not a coincidence. Sure, he has worked as a developer for many years and, among other things, built business systems for retail. But it was when he changed career to become a teacher that he took the first step towards MTEK. “I taught at the technology program at Woxgym. But after a few years realized that I missed programming". MTEK has an extended collaboration with the Woxgym high school. Part of the classes are located  at MTEK's head office in Alfta, where the students are taught production technology and leadership. "In that way, I get to work with both programming and teaching in the same package". Not only that. Almost half of the employees at MTEK come from Woxgym and many have had Per Westerfur as a teacher. "If MTEK had not found these students with this capacity and ambitions and given them jobs, then they would have moved from the municipality. It is an important part of our role in the local community.” Per has taken on an informal mentoring role for several of the younger new employees. "But I don't  see them as old students. They are colleagues and now we learn from each other". Per Westerfur really thrives in that role. “The dynamic here is really rewarding and productive. What we do is quite complex and there are high set goals. That really lights my fire.”

name: Tobias Grossman
title: System Developer
bio: Tobias left his company in the Philippines - found new challenges at MTEK: "Incredibly creative" It was the year of 2000. "Almost everyone who could spell IT got a job," Tobias Grossman, 45, says and laughs. He himself took a six-month course. Then he got a job. One thing Tobias did was being involved in building up the site bytbil.com (which is now owned by blocket.se). He also ran his own company for a few years. When love brought him to the Philippines, he started a slightly larger company. "We made apps and developed systems for Swedish customers. I had around 50 employees at the most and it was going well," Tobias says. But children grow up. Life changes and the family needed to make a decision about where to live: The Philippines or Sweden? In the end, the decision to move back home to Hälsingland was quite easy. "I had done some work for Mattias (Andersson, CEO here at MTEK) before and I knew he was doing something exciting". Tobias got a job right away. It was in 2019. MBrain was being developed and MTEK was starting to grow. “It was a new challenge, and it keeps growing all the time. The order was: `Do exactly what you want as long as you make MBrain better! `I joined an incredibly creative and inspiring group.” Working with MBrain is a privilege, Tobias says. "You notice that some factories are almost like dinosaurs when it comes to IT. With MBrain, we bring them to the present in just a few weeks. They get more control over their production. They get all the information gathered in one place - and become many times more efficient.” Leaving the Philippines and a life as self-employed to work for someone else at MTEK is not something Tobias regrets. Here he has been given a tailor-made role. “I´m part ot the test team, but I am a developer. This means that I develop the tools we use to test MBrain, to make sure that it has the quality the customers require." Tobias thrives in that team: “Everyone is so nice and motivated! There´s an entrepreneurial spirit that makes everyone grow.” The coolest thing about MBrain is: The simplicity in creating instructions for production. The best thing about working at MTEK is: The entrepreneurial spirit – we dare to aim for the stars.

name: Tomas Olsson
title: System Developer
bio: Coincidence brought Tomas to MTEK - now he is one of the veterans: "Then it's worth all of the hard work" “This is exactly what I want to do. At MTEK, I get to work with the latest technology and the most exciting projects". That's what computer engineer Tomas Olsson, 46, says. After many years as self-employed, he had taken a job as an employee, a job he enjoyed. But then, by coincidence, he ran into our CEO Mattias Andersson. One thing led to another and Tomas started working with MTEK. "It was 2018. We were four people at the development then. It was a lot of fun. We were immediately given a lot of personal responsibility". Despite the fact that it has only been almost four years since then, Tomas is now considered one of the veterans. This is due to all the new employees. “It's a great group and it's really good that we're growing. In the beginning, we had to do more things in the entire chain. Now that there are more of us, more customers and more projects, we developers can become more specialized and do what we do best. It makes you progress and grow.” Tomas has a large part in MBrain's growth. "Certainly, one can easily believe that MBrain is only about efficiency. But there are many integrated parts. It is also about reducing waste and increasing traceability. It's really good stuff! There is also an environmental and recycling aspect to it. That makes the job extra fun". To the uninitiated, working as a software developer can look quite monotonous. An mass of incomprehensible numbers and letters on several large screens. “It's about solving problems, that's what makes me tick. You get an assignment or an idea and then you have to solve it for the customer's benefit. Sure, it can be frustrating at times along the way, but when you succeed - then it's worth all of the hard work!".

name: Tord Johnson
title: CTO
bio:
I have a PhD in Electronics with a long background in the EMS industry. I have  supported customers in production and manufacturing technologies as well as
securing the supply chain in order to reduce time-to-market, maintain high
quality and reduce manufacturing costs. I have been with MTEK for the past 15 years - working on global level
with operational excellence programs - connecting to our client’s strategy and
secure execution on the operative level. I am the co-author of four books on the
topic of design and manufacturing excellence for the electronics industry. MBrain
is for MTEK our way to systemize and digitalize our knowledge and allow more
customers to make use of it. It is the software that we wished we had access to
during our consulting years.

name: Elisabeth Pålsgård
title: Financial and Administrative Officer
bio: Elisabeth was the first employee at MTEK - "I have the best job in the world" When MTEK's founder Mattias Andersson changed direction and received a large order in the company, he made a decision: "We were about to make a brutal investment. This called for exceptional money management.” At an event in his home village Alfta in 2017, he met Elisabeth Pålsgård, 45. The very next day he emailed the employment contract, and Elisabeth became the first employee at MTEK. "At that time, I was managing the administration of the family business, which dealt with contracting, real estate services and we also had a shop. What Mattias envisioned was something completely different from what I was used to", Elisabeth says. As a self-taught financial administrator, she initially had to handle everything from bookkeeping, payroll and invoicing to property management. “I'm glad to have been involved from the beginning. I have seen the whole journey and fully understand how the company works. Should I have started today, it would have been more difficult to get the same overview.” From starting off slowly during the first years, the hiring rate has now increased considerably here at the company. We have exceeded 50 employees and during the summer - with temporary workers - the figure is around 70. "But luckily, we are also growing on the support side. Today there are several people who work with HR, administration and structure", Elisabeth says. Today she has the title Financial and Administrative Officer and she thrives in that role. “I have the world's best job and the world's best colleagues. Although it can be stressful at times, it is never boring. And even if we have grown and have a lot more employees now, everyone is equally important and we are all headed in the same direction. We lift each other up and we have fun, that's the best thing about working at MTEK.” Elisabeth is one of the few who does not actually work with MBrain. “But we have sprint demos every other Friday, so I keep up with what we're doing. And it's impressive what a tool we've created. It's almost difficult to comprehend how fast it goes.” The coolest thing about MBrain is: An incredibly good tool. And it's pretty too. The best thing about working at MTEK is: The culture among the employees. We help each other and we work hard while having fun at work.

name: Elin Ryösä
title: QA Engineer
bio: Geologist Elin changed career to quality assurance tester - "I got a kick from it" Every installation and development of MBrain requires thorough testing before it is released. Quality tester Elin Ryösa, 41, has an important role in that process. "The development should not take place at the customer. Everything must be completely ready and stable before we deliver”, she says. The more MBrain evolves, the more complicated it becomes. “It´s necessary to constantly keep testing so the code base is not affected. Rigorous testing protocols are required with each update.” Elin has a very concentrated look when she describes her job here at MTEK. She has been here since 2019. But the road here was not straight, at all. “When I was 14, I got my first computer. I really liked testing programming. It's basically about solving logical problems. I got a kick from it.”, she says. Nevertheless, she studied geology, in both Uppsala and Luleå. "I did research on minerals for SSAB and LKAB in Luleå before moving back home to Hälsingland.  I got a job as a field geologist at Kringelgruvan outside Edsbyn." After a few years, there was an opportunity to study while working. "I had worked a bit with automation and I also had the interest for programming. That's why I studied to become an automation engineer." One day there was an open house at Alfta industrial center, where MTEK has its premises. “Wow, is there a company like this in little Alfta? I talked my way in and got to do my degree project at MTEK. It went so well that I got a job right after I finished the education”, Elin says with a smile. It was the year 2019. From the beginning she worked full-time with programming. But a year ago she changed to quality assurance tester. “We are on a very exciting journey. To see how we build a tool that adds value to the industry on a daily basis is so exciting!" Elin says and continues: "Here at MTEK, we have an amazing team spirit. Everyone wants to move forward. And to see how our work makes other companies save both time and money in their factories is so rewarding!” The coolest thing about MBrain is: That it can be used to reduce waste of resources, and that is positive both from an economic and an environmental perspective. The best thing about working at MTEK is: All the skillful and knowledgeable colleagues who work here, and to have the opportunity to connect everyone's perspectives into the testing.

name: Johan Pålsson
title: Team Leader Test & Validation and IS/IT Integration

name: Manasa Rao
title: System Test Engineer
bio: The doctor Manasa changed India for Sweden – Fell for MTEK: "The challenge intrigued me" When you leave the small childhood village in India – how come you end up in Alfta? When you get a job as a doctor after studying medicine – how come you change it to the role of software tester at MTEK? Manasa Rao, 30, has an interesting background to say the least. "Here at MTEK, I have really found my place. It has been an amazing journey," she says. The step from India to Sweden is big, but there is an explanation to it. Her husband, Suraj Rao, works for Ericsson. And when the job brought him to Stockholm, Manasa came along. And despite working as a doctor, she was looking for something new to do. "I've always been interested in development, so when I saw an ad from MTEK I was intrigued" It has been a move she does not regret. "What MTEK has done is incredibly interesting and my job is exciting and challenging. I have mostly worked with mobile applications before. MBrain is so much more complicated. Here I work with super skilled colleagues and I learn new things all the time". Moving to Alfta can seem like a big contrast to southern India. “But it's quite similar to the home village. The nature, the mountains and the houses, even if we don't have any snow there. Here in Alfta it is so peaceful. The people are so welcoming”. “My colleagues have also been very welcoming,” Manasa says. "I have received a really good introduction, not only about the job but also about the culture at MTEK. A perfect start to my new career. Everyone is positive and really eager to help.” The coolest thing about MBrain is: Even though I am very new to MBrain as per my learning til now Mbrain makes the complex manufacturing process smooth and efficient. The best thing about working at MTEK is: Working with skilled, humble colleagues and learning new things every day.

name: Sara Rylander
title: COO
bio: Sara Rylander, 40, is not afraid of challenges or quick changes. While studying humanities, she worked her way up to Purchasing manager at her side job in trade. With two children - one newborn - she and her husband decided to hastily sell their three-room apartment in Täby for a 200 square meter Hälsingegård outside Edsbyn, just because "it was so nice there". As a humanist with a secure job at the university, she instead took a job as an administrator for the school bus and transport service "just to gain a foothold". And when she first heard about MTEK, she frowned because "it's absolutely not in my line of work". Nevertheless, today she has a key role with us. "I read an article about MTEK and Mattias (Andersson, CEO) in the business newspaper Dagens Industri . He has succeeded in creating a world leading high-tech company here in little Alfta. It was so fascinating that someone could resist the Stockholm concentration. I was so impressed that I wrote to him on Linkedin," Sara says. Four months later, she left her top job as Municipal secretary at Ovanåker municipality and was employed by MTEK. "It´s a strength that I am a humanist and not an engineer. I see the big picture in a different manner". Sara's title is Chief Operating Officer (COO). She describes it as a spider in a web. Her role is to supervise administrative and operational daily functions. She doesn't miss her old jobs or the apartment in Täby. "Here I have a super exciting job in a global environment, while at the same time I have ski tracks, ski slope, stables, soccer and the forest within just five minutes. It's a perfect balance between work and life quality," Sara says and continues: "The job is so incredibly creative and at the same time the atmosphere is nice. You can't really put your finger on it, but there is a desire in the air to perform, that we should succeed in what we are doing." The coolest thing about MBrain is: That you do not need to be a software developer to understand and use the system - it is incredibly user-friendly and flexible. Plus, the possibilities are endless! The best thing about working at MTEK is: Team MTEK really is TEAM MTEK! There is an incredible power in our company culture.

name: William Eriksson
title: Junior Deployment Engineer
bio: William started his career here at MTEK through the internship program by Tekniksprånget . Since he really likes it here after his 4 months internship and we really valued having him we decided to keep him, it’s a win win. What have you done before MTEK? Before I worked at MTEK, I did a 3-year high school education in technology with a focus on data and media, after I graduated I studied computer security and network technology. So far, what is your impression of MTEK as a company? My impression of MTEK so far exceeds expectations, all the colleagues are very nice and everything feels so relaxed, it feels like everyone here is part of a one big family, I think the working environment and the working conditions you work in are fantastic and that contributes a lot to a workplace in order to thrive. What do you look forward most to, the coming months, working at MTEK? What I am looking forward to the most in the coming months at MTEK is increasing my skills in programming and Test & Validation and also being able to contribute with something that will be able to be used by MTEK's customers as well as being able to participate and contribute with potential solutions during the course of the work. I am also looking forward to getting to know all the new colleagues as much as possible. Where will you mostly be found, when not at work? When I'm not working, you can usually find me on the golf course, on the paddle course or out in the city with my friends. Short about Tekniksprånget: Tekniksprånget is a 4-month internship program that aims to encourage more young adults (18-20 years old) to choose higher technical education. The program will help meet future skills needs and increase interest in technical careers. Traineeship starts 21 August until 22 December (4 months) Please visit www.teknikspranget.se or https://www.instagram.com/teknikspranget/ for more information​​​​​​​
